---
title: "Network analysis simulation"
author: "Alexander Täuber"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
fig-width: 7
fig-height: 7
project:
    execute-dir: project
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source(here::here("scripts/_load_all.R"))

manifest <- make_manifest()
manifest <- extract_dtms(manifest)
manifest <- preprocess_clouds(manifest)


tst_p <- "C:/Users/alex-work/Desktop/repos/tsq_structure_new/data/processed/2023-08-12_02-51-50_A_F35_0306_dtm_r0.3.ply"
tst <- Rvcg::vcgPlyRead(tst_p)
rgl::plot3d(tst)
tst2 <- clip_mesh(tst, 5)
rgl::plot3d(tst2)
Rvcg::vcgPlyWrite(tst, "tst.ply")
Rvcg::vcgPlyWrite(tst2, "tst2.ply")
```
